text: Analyses of Proposed Constitutional Amendments November 7, 2023, Election Texas Legislative Council

PROPOSITION 1 (H.J.R. 126) The constitutional amendment protecting the right to engage in farming. SUMMARY ANALYSIS The proposal protects generally accepted agricultural practices. BACKGROUND Existing statutes regulate agricultural operations. SUMMARY OF COMMENTS Comments by Supporters: • The amendment would protect farms from unnecessary regulation. Text of H.J.R. 126
